mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, directly increasing S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive 20d returns occur in less than 50% of declining rate periods.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending, which reduces corporate earnings expectations and drives negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in more than 65% of instances when UNRATE rises above the 0.2 percentage point threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and business demand growth, which boosts corporate revenue forecasts and generates positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60d returns with a statistical significance level of p less than 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which improves short-term equity valuations and yields positive S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases fail to correlate with positive 5d forward returns during early-cycle phases, with a point-biserial correlation below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of tighter monetary policy and margin compression, which suppresses equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL monthly increases above 0.4% are followed by positive 20d returns in more than 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms robust labor market tightening, which supports wage growth and consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal of rising PAYEMS and falling UNRATE yields a negative or zero 60d forward return in more than 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product growth directly increases aggregate corporate profits and equity cash flow expectations, resulting in positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: GDPC1 quarterly growth rates show no statistically significant relationship with 20d forward returns, with Rank IC below 0.01 over 5-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in industrial production signals immediate supply-side weakness and reduced factory activity, which triggers short-term risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: INDPRO monthly declines below -0.2% are followed by positive 5d returns in more than 60% of instances.
